title: 皐月賞の後に・我が刹那にて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After winning the Satsuki Sho in spectacular
fashion, Mejiro Ardan reflects on both her
hard-fought victory and how far she's come since
the debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, however, the memory of Yaeno
Muteki and Sakura Chiyono O's running refuses to
fade from her mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without letting the victory go to her head, Mejiro
Ardan promises to continue her winning streak at
the Aoba Sho and the Japanese Derby
afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Mejiro Ardan's win reminds Yaeno
Muteki and Sakura Chiyono O of the threat she
poses for the upcoming Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Motivated by their loss at the Satsuki Sho, they
each vow to seize victory at the Japanese Derby.
